permissionText: Camera access is required to scan books.
captureHint: Takes a photo and identifies the book
noBooksFoundMessage: Point the camera at a book cover and try again.
scanFailedMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again.
noResultsMessage: No books found. Try a different title or author.
searchFailedMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again.
addedMessage: "{{title}}" has been added to your wishlist.
couldNotSaveMessage: Failed to add book to wishlist. Please try again.
scanUnavailableMessage: Cover scanning is temporarily unavailable. Try searching by title instead.
savedOffline: Saved for when you're back online
maxRetries: Maximum retries reached. Saved for later.
